feed.title: Docket updates for IN RE: Glucagon-like Peptide-1 Receptor Agonists (GLP-1 RAs) Products Liability Litigation, MDL No. 3094
feed.rights: Created for the public domain by Free Law Project

entry.title: Entry #598 in IN RE: Glucagon-like Peptide-1 Receptor Agonists (GLP-1 RAs) Products Liability Litigation, MDL No. 3094
entry.summary: NOTICE OF POTENTIAL TAG-ALONG -- 1 Action(s) -- counsel for Defendant(s) Defendants Novo Nordisk A/S and Novo Nordisk Inc. -- Mississippi Northern District Court (1:26-cv-00119) (Attachments: # 1 Schedule of Actions, # 2 Proof of Service, # 3 Complaint MSN/1:26-cv-00119) (Brown, Loren) (Entered: 07/24/2026)

entry.title: Entry #597 in IN RE: Glucagon-like Peptide-1 Receptor Agonists (GLP-1 RAs) Products Liability Litigation, MDL No. 3094
entry.summary: MINUTE ORDER CLOSING BRIEFING re: pldg. ( 586 in MDL No. 3094, 2 in NCM/1:26-cv-00475) Briefing in this matter is now closed. The parties to action(s) on the motion(s) remain under a duty, pursuant to Panel Rule 6.1(f), to notify the Clerk of the Panel promptly of any development that would partially or completely moot this matter. Signed by Clerk of the Panel Jessica D. Birnbaum on 7/23/2026. Associated Cases: MDL No. 3094, NCM/1:26-cv-00475 (CDA) (Entered: 07/23/2026)
